steps.title: Solve the system by elimination
steps.content: Multiply the first equation by $5$ to get $5x+120y=300$. Subtract the second equation: $$(5x+120y)-(5x+3y)=300-27,$$ giving $117y=273$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $2.333,7/3$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $2.333,7/3$.
